title: Nature X Plus
description: Nature X as you've never experienced it before!
body:
**Nature X as you've never experienced it before!**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rq9GnZUyu28" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**********************************************************************
**Description:**
This **MOD** transforms the beloved visuals of the [Nature X Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nature-x/) into real, interactive in-game blocks and items. Designed to make your Minecraft environment more lush and immersive with new blocks, mechanics, and biomes! 

**Dependencies:**
Nature X Plus only requires **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** & **[Terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)** to run!
